2605.30348.title: LLMSurgeon: Diagnosing Data Mixture of Large Language Models
2605.30348.paper_summary: The pretraining data mixture of Large Language Models (LLMs) constitutes their "digital DNA", shaping model behaviors, capabilities, and failure modes. Yet this composition is rarely disclosed, making post-hoc auditing of data combination or provenance difficult. In this work, we formalize $\textbf{Data Mixture Surgery (DMS)}$: given only generated text from a target LLM, estimate the domain-level distribution of its pretraining corpus under a predefined taxonomy. We propose $\textbf{LLMSurgeon}$, a strong framework that casts DMS as an inverse problem under the label-shift assumption. Rather than directly aggregating classifier outputs, LLMSurgeon estimates a calibrated $\textit{soft}$ confusion matrix and solves a constrained inverse problem to correct systematic domain confusion and recover the latent mixture prior. To evaluate, we introduce $\textbf{LLMScan}$, a recipe-verifiable evaluation suite built from open-source LLMs with transparent pretraining mixtures. Across LLMScan, LLMSurgeon recovers domain mixtures with high fidelity under fixed protocols. Our work presents a practical, post-hoc approach for auditing the digital DNA of foundation models without access to their training data.
2605.30348.paper_summary_zh: 大型語言模型（LLMs）的預訓練數據混合構成了它們的「數位DNA」，塑造了模型的行為、能力和失效模式。<lb/>然而，這種組成很少被披露，使得事後審計數據組合或來源變得困難。<lb/>在這項工作中，我們形式化了 $\textbf{數據混合手術 (DMS)}$：僅根據來自目標LLM的生成文本，估計其預訓練語料庫在預定分類法下的領域級分佈。<lb/>我們提出了 $\textbf{LLMSurgeon}$，這是一個強大的框架，將DMS視為在標籤轉移假設下的逆問題。<lb/>LLMSurgeon不是直接聚合分類器輸出，而是估計一個校準的 $\textit{soft}$ 混淆矩陣，並解決一個受限的逆問題，以修正系統性的領域混淆並恢復潛在的混合先驗。<lb/>為了評估，我們引入了 $\textbf{LLMScan}$，這是一個基於開源LLM的、具有透明預訓練混合的可驗證評估套件。<lb/>在LLMScan中，LLMSurgeon在固定的協議下以高保真度恢復領域混合。<lb/>我們的工作提出了一種實用的事後方法，用於審計基礎模型的數位DNA，而無需訪問其訓練數據。
2605.30348.author: Yaxin Luo et.al.
2605.30348.authors: Yaxin Luo, Jiacheng Cui, Xiaohan Zhao, Xinyi Shang, Jiacheng Liu, Xinyue Bi, Zhaoyi Li, Zhiqiang Shen
